ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size entry */,
  "size_category" TEXT /* Size category (e.g., XS, S, M, L) */,
  "it_size" INTEGER /* Size measurement in Italy */,
  "us_size" INTEGER /* Size measurement in the US */,
  "ca_size" INTEGER /* Size measurement in Canada */,
  "fr_size" INTEGER /* Size measurement in France */,
  "de_size" INTEGER /* Size measurement in Germany */,
  "gb_size" INTEGER /* Size measurement in Great Britain */,
  "es_size" INTEGER /* Size measurement in Spain */,
  "kr_size" INTEGER /* Size measurement in South Korea */,
  "jp_size" TEXT /* Size measurement in Japan */,
  "chest_circumference" REAL /* Chest circumference measurement */,
  "waist_circumference" REAL /* Waist circumference measurement */,
  "hip_circumference" REAL /* Hip circumference measurement */,
  "inseam" REAL /* Inseam measurement */,
  "sleeve_length" REAL /* Sleeve length measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the product was released */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material used to make the product */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "stock_level" INTEGER /* Current stock level for the product in the specified size */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse where the product is stored */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the inventory was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale transaction */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sold product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity sold */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the sale took place */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the sale */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the purchase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the brand */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the brand */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouses" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "warehouse_name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the warehouse */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the warehouse */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Customer's mailing address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each size entry
Size category (e.g., XS, S, M, L)
Material used to make the product
Unique identifier for each inventory record
Current stock level for the product in the specified size
ID of the warehouse where the product is stored

Region where the sale took place
ID of the customer who made the purchase
Date and time the user last logged in
